raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year> I was notified that my XXXX XXXX credit card issued by Barclays bank was charged for {$13000.00} and {$1000.00}, I did not make these purchases. I received a text message asking me if I recognized these charges to which I replied no. A Barclays agent called me and said that both charges would not go through and I wouldn't be responsible for those charges. 

The full {$14000.00} still showed up on my statement balance. Since the incident, Barclays has closed my credit card account. When asked about the incident, they reaffirmed that even the account has been closed, I would not be responsible for the charge. 

Today, XX/XX/year>, I was notified that my XXXX checking account was charged for the full amount of {$14000.00} since the previous autopayment I set up with Barclays. After checking the online system with Barclays I saw the {$14000.00} even incurred an interest of {$340.00}.
